mapper.insert: insert into store_dish (store_id, dish_id, status, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{storeId}, #{dishId}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select sd.dish_id from store_dish sd left join dish d on sd.dish_id = d.id where sd.store_id = #{storeId} and sd.status = 1 and d.category_id = #{categoryId} and d.status = 1
